message.content:
### (1) Page Rendering Status  
The anime detail sheet renders correctly. The **anime poster** (a dark, action-themed image with characters) is visible in the top-left section. The **title** ("Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba") is prominently displayed next to the poster. The **synopsis** (a paragraph describing the plot) is present below the title and genre tags, detailing the story of Tanjiro and his sister Nezuko.  


### (2) Yugen Logo in Header  
The **Yugen logo is visible in the header** (top-left corner). It is a circular icon with a stylized "Y" (or similar monogram) inside, consistent with the app’s branding.  


### (3) Title with Kanji  
The title displays **"Yugen" with the kanji '幽玄'** (the Japanese term for "subtle profundity," aligning with the app’s name). The kanji appears in a smaller font below the English title "Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba."  


### (4) Bookmark/Save Button  
A **bookmark/save button is present** (labeled "PLAN TO WATCH"). It is a purple-outlined button with a checkmark icon and the text "PLAN TO WATCH" (not a generic "My List"). A toast notification at the top confirms the action: "Added to Plan to Watch."  


### (5) Overall Layout  
The layout is structured as follows:  
- **Top Section**: Header with the Yugen logo (left) and a toast notification ("Added to Plan to Watch") below it.  
- **Anime Poster & Title**: A large poster image (left) paired with the title ("Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba") and kanji ("鬼滅の刃") to the right.  
- **Metadata**: Below the title, details include:  
  - A blue "FINISHED" tag, an 83% rating (star icon), "TV" label, and "SPRING 2019" release info.  
  - "26 eps" (episode count) and genre tags ("ACTION," "ADVENTURE," "DRAMA," "FANTASY," "SUPERNATURAL").  
- **Action Buttons**: Two prominent buttons: a peach "Watch Now" (play icon) and a purple "PLAN TO WATCH" (checkmark icon).  
- **Synopsis**: A paragraph summarizing the plot (Tanjiro’s journey to become a demon slayer).  
- **Studio Info**: "Studio: ufotable" (below the synopsis).  
- **Episodes Section**: A header "EPISODES" with a search bar ("Find episode...") and "26 ep" count. Three episode entries (1, 2, 3) are listed, each with a play icon and "24 min" duration.  


All elements are clearly visible, and the design follows a dark-themed, user-friendly interface typical of anime streaming apps.
